blocks.text: Match preview: Gulbarga Mystics face Hubli Tigers in 16th Match (T20) on Mon, 29 Jun, 2026, 2:30 pm at KSCA Hubli Cricket Ground Hubli. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.
Standard T20 surface expected. Conditions will be clearer at the toss — monitor team selection and dew factor for night games.
Expected par score: 160–180 runs par score.
Drizzle · High 28°C / Low 22°C · Rain: 3.2 mm · Wind: up to 30 km/h. Light rain possible — overcast conditions could assist swing bowling early.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
